summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Luna Group VIP Gift Card Checkout API and Staff Portal features. All 28 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Rewards Shop shows 'Pay $X AUD' button (not 'Coming Soon'), Venue Dashboard has Staff Portal button, Staff Portal page renders with member search and action buttons.

integration_issues.issue: 401 error on /api/payments/wallet/balance when navigating directly to rewards-shop (session not persisted)

critical_code_review_comments: Gift card checkout API correctly calculates 10% bonus (e.g., $25 -> $27.50 wallet credit)
Staff endpoints properly enforce role-based access (admin/staff/manager required)
Tier-based benefits correctly enforced (Bronze tier denied comp drinks and guest entry)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gift Card checkout with Stripe is working (test keys). Staff Portal member search and profile APIs working. Tier-based benefits enforced correctly. The test user luna@test.com has admin role but Bronze tier, so staff endpoints work but tier-specific perks (comp drinks, guest entry) are denied.

mocked_apis.Stripe payments: Test keys (sk_test_emergent) - checkout sessions created but payment won't complete
mocked_apis.CherryHub CRM: MOCKED - Blocked by auth scopes (403 error)

gift_card_packages_api.details: GET /api/payments/packages returns 4 gift card packages with correct 10% bonus values

gift_card_checkout_api.details: POST /api/payments/gift-card/checkout creates Stripe checkout session, returns checkout_url, session_id, wallet_credit, bonus

wallet_balance_api.details: GET /api/payments/wallet/balance returns wallet_balance for authenticated user

member_search_api.details: GET /api/perks/member/search?q=luna returns matching members with tier info

member_profile_api.details: GET /api/perks/member/{user_id}/profile returns detailed profile with benefits and today activity

entry_log_api.details: POST /api/perks/entry/log logs venue entry, awards points

rewards_shop_ui.details: Gift cards displayed with 10% bonus, button shows 'Pay $X AUD' when card selected

venue_dashboard_staff_portal_button.details: Venue Dashboard has 'STAFF PORTAL - VALIDATE PERKS' button linking to /staff-portal

staff_portal_ui.details: Staff Portal renders with search bar, member search results, member profile with actions and tier benefits

api_verification./api/payments/packages: PASS - Returns 16 packages including 4 gift cards with wallet_credit
api_verification./api/payments/gift-card/checkout: PASS - Creates Stripe checkout session with 10% bonus
api_verification./api/payments/wallet/balance: PASS - Returns wallet_balance for authenticated user
api_verification./api/perks/member/search: PASS - Returns matching members with tier info
api_verification./api/perks/member/{user_id}/profile: PASS - Returns detailed profile with benefits
